nemo_retriever.harness.portal package#

Submodules#

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app module#

FastAPI portal for viewing and triggering nemo_retriever harness runs.

Bases: BaseModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "AlertRuleCreateRequest",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "name": {
         "title": "Name",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "description": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Description"
      },
      "metric": {
         "title": "Metric",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "operator": {
         "title": "Operator",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "threshold": {
         "title": "Threshold",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "dataset_filter": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Dataset Filter"
      },
      "preset_filter": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Preset Filter"
      },
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "slack_notify": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Slack Notify",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "required": [
      "name",
      "metric",
      "operator",
      "threshold"
   ]
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.DatasetCreateRequest[source]#

Bases: BaseModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "DatasetCreateRequest",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "name": {
         "title": "Name",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "path": {
         "title": "Path",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "query_csv": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Query Csv"
      },
      "input_type": {
         "default": "pdf",
         "title": "Input Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "recall_required": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Recall Required",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "recall_match_mode": {
         "default": "audio_segment",
         "title": "Recall Match Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "recall_adapter": {
         "default": "none",
         "title": "Recall Adapter",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "evaluation_mode": {
         "default": "none",
         "title": "Evaluation Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "beir_loader": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Beir Loader"
      },
      "beir_dataset_name": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Beir Dataset Name"
      },
      "beir_split": {
         "default": "test",
         "title": "Beir Split",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "beir_query_language": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Beir Query Language"
      },
      "beir_doc_id_field": {
         "default": "pdf_basename",
         "title": "Beir Doc Id Field",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "beir_ks": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "integer"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Beir Ks"
      },
      "ocr_version": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "v1",
                  "v2"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Version"
      },
      "ocr_lang": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "multi",
                  "english"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Lang"
      },
      "lancedb_table_name": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Lancedb Table Name"
      },
      "embed_model_name": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Embed Model Name"
      },
      "embed_modality": {
         "default": "text",
         "title": "Embed Modality",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embed_granularity": {
         "default": "element",
         "title": "Embed Granularity",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "extract_page_as_image": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Extract Page As Image",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_infographics": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Extract Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "distribute": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Distribute",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "description": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Description"
      },
      "tags": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Tags"
      }
   },
   "required": [
      "name",
      "path"
   ]
}

  • beir_dataset_name (str | None)

  • beir_ks (list[int] | None)

         "default": null,
         "title": "Embed Modality"
      },
      "embed_granularity": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,

      },

         "anyOf": [

               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Extract Page As Image"

      "extract_infographics": {
         "anyOf": [

               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Extract Infographics"
      },
      "distribute": {
         "anyOf": [

               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Distribute"
      },

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Description"
      },
      "tags": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Tags"
      }
   }
}

      },

         "default": "",
         "title": "Remote",

         "default": true,
         "title": "Update Runners",
         "type": "boolean"
      }

}

               },

            },

            }

            },

               "type": "null"
            }

   "required": [

   ]

         "default": "nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-1b-v2",

         "title": "Query",
         "type": "string"
      },

            "type": "string"
         },

         "type": "array"
      },

         "default": 512,
         "title": "Max Length",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "batch_size": {
         "default": 32,
         "title": "Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "required": [
      "query",
      "documents"
   ]
}

            },
            {

            }
         ],
         "default": null,

      },

         "default": "online",

               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Tags"
      },

               "type": "object"

            }

      },

            },

            }

      },

               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ray Address"
      }
   },
   "required": [
      "name"
   ]
}

   "type": "object",
   "properties": {

         "default": "",

         "type": "string"
      },

            {
               "type": "string"
            },

            }

      },

               "type": "string"
            },
            {

            }
         ],

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Config"
      },
      "trigger_type": {
         "default": "cron",
         "title": "Trigger Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "cron_expression": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Cron Expression"
      },
      "github_repo": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Github Repo"
      },
      "github_branch": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Github Branch"
      },
      "min_gpu_count": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Min Gpu Count"
      },
      "gpu_type_pattern": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Gpu Type Pattern"

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Min Cpu Count"
      },
      "min_memory_gb": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Min Memory Gb"
      },
      "preferred_runner_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Preferred Runner Id"
      },
      "preferred_runner_ids": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "integer"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Preferred Runner Ids"
      },
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "tags": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Tags"
      }
   },
   "required": [
      "name"
   ]
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.TriggerRequest[source]#

Bases: BaseModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "TriggerRequest",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "dataset": {
         "title": "Dataset",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "preset": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Preset"
      },
      "config": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Config"
      },
      "tags": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Tags"
      },
      "runner_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Runner Id"
      },
      "git_ref": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Git Ref"
      },
      "git_commit": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Git Commit"
      },
      "nsys_profile": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Nsys Profile",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "graph_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Graph Id"
      },
      "run_mode": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Run Mode"
      },
      "service_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Service Url"
      },
      "service_max_concurrency": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Service Max Concurrency"
      }
   },
   "required": [
      "dataset"
   ]
}

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.acknowledge_alert_event_endpoint(event_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.acknowledge_all_alerts()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.bundle_report_images(
req: ReportBundleRequest,
)[source]#

Accept base64 PNG data-URLs from the client and return a ZIP archive.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.cancel_job_endpoint(job_id: str)[source]#

Request cancellation of a pending or running job.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.cancel_matrix_run(matrix_run_id: str)[source]#

Cancel all pending and running jobs that belong to a matrix run.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.claim_job(job_id: str)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.complete_job_endpoint(
job_id: str,
req: JobCompleteRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_alert_rule(
req: AlertRuleCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_database_backup(
req: DatabaseBackupRequest,
)[source]#

Create a backup of the current database.

storage_type must be "local" or "s3". For local backups destination is a directory path. For S3 it is a URI like s3://bucket/prefix.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_graph_endpoint(
req: GraphCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_managed_dataset(
req: DatasetCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_managed_preset(
req: PresetCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_preset_matrix(
req: PresetMatrixCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_runner(
req: RunnerCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.create_schedule(
req: ScheduleCreateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_alert_rule_endpoint(rule_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_database_backup(
backup_id: int,
delete_file: bool = Query(False),
)[source]#

Delete a backup record and optionally the underlying file.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_graph_endpoint(graph_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_managed_dataset(dataset_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_managed_preset(preset_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_playground_session(session_id: str)[source]#

Delete a playground upload session and its files.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_preset_matrix(matrix_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_run(run_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_runner_endpoint(runner_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_runs_bulk(
req: BulkDeleteRunsRequest,
)[source]#

Delete multiple runs in one request.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.delete_schedule_endpoint(schedule_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.deploy_latest(req: DeployRequest)[source]#

Pull the latest code from a remote branch and restart the portal.

Steps: 1. git fetch <remote> 2. git checkout <remote>/<branch> (or <branch> for local) 3. git pull <remote> <branch> (if on a tracking branch) 4. Restart the process via os.execv to pick up code changes.

The HTTP response is sent before the restart so the client receives confirmation. A short delay gives the response time to flush.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.diagnose_job(job_id: str)[source]#

Explain why a pending job has not yet been picked up by a runner.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.download_dataset_by_id(dataset_id: int)[source]#

Download a distributable dataset by ID as a zip archive.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.download_dataset_by_name(name: str)[source]#

Download a distributable dataset as a zip archive.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.download_nsys_profile(run_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.download_playground_session(session_id: str)[source]#

Download all files in a playground session as a zip archive.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.download_run_json(run_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.download_run_zip(run_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.export_database_json(
source: str = Query(current),
backup_id: int | None = Query(None),
)[source]#

Export all raw data from the database as a downloadable JSON file.

source=current exports the live database. source=backup together with backup_id exports from a specific backup file.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.export_datasets_yaml()[source]#

Export all managed datasets as a downloadable YAML file.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.export_presets_yaml()[source]#

Export all managed presets as a downloadable YAML file.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.export_runs_json(
dataset: str | None = Query(None),
preset: str | None = Query(None),
status: str | None = Query(None),
date_from: str | None = Query(None),
date_to: str | None = Query(None),
include_raw: bool = Query(True),
limit: int = Query(5000),
)[source]#

Export historical run data as a downloadable JSON file.

Supports the same filters as the reporting UI. Each run includes full detail and optionally the raw result JSON for offline analysis.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.force_delete_job(job_id: str)[source]#

Permanently delete a job regardless of its current status.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_alert_metrics()[source]#

Return valid metric names for alert rules.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_alert_rule(rule_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_config()[source]#

Return dataset and preset names from the managed database entries.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_cursor_config(request: Request)[source]#

Return a ready-to-use .cursor/mcp.json snippet for connecting to this portal.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_database_info()[source]#

Return current database path, size, and per-table row counts.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_dataset_hash_by_name(name: str)[source]#

Return the lightweight hash for a distributable dataset.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_git_info()[source]#

Return information about the current git state of the portal codebase.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_graph_endpoint(graph_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_job(job_id: str)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_job_logs(job_id: str)[source]#

Return the stored log tail for a job.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_managed_dataset(dataset_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_managed_preset(preset_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_mcp_audit_log(
limit: int = Query(200),
offset: int = Query(0),
tool_name: str | None = Query(None),
agent_name: str | None = Query(None),
success: bool | None = Query(None),
)[source]#

Return paginated MCP audit log entries.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_mcp_audit_stats()[source]#

Return aggregated MCP audit log statistics.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_mcp_config()[source]#

Return current MCP server configuration.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_portal_settings()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_preset_matrix(matrix_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_rerun_info(run_id: int)[source]#

Return the information needed to re-run: original hostname and runner match status.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_run(run_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_run_command(run_id: int)[source]#

Return the shell command that was executed for this run.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_run_lancedb_info(run_id: int)[source]#

Check whether a run has a usable LanceDB database and return metadata.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_runner(runner_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_schedule(schedule_id: int)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_version()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.get_yaml_config()[source]#

Return empty config — all datasets and presets are managed via the Portal UI.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.github_webhook(request: Request)[source]#

Receive GitHub push events and dispatch matching schedules.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.import_datasets_yaml(
file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined),
)[source]#

Import datasets from an uploaded YAML file.

Each top-level key is a dataset name. Existing datasets with the same name are updated; new names are inserted.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.import_presets_yaml(
file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined),
)[source]#

Import presets from an uploaded YAML file.

Each top-level key is a preset name. Existing presets with the same name are updated; new names are inserted.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.index()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_alert_events(
limit: int = Query(200),
rule_id: int | None = Query(None),
acknowledged: bool | None = Query(None),
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_alert_rules()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_database_backups()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_datasets()[source]#

Return distinct dataset names from run history (legacy).

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_gpu_types()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_graphs_endpoint()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_inactive_datasets()[source]#

Return all soft-deleted (inactive) datasets.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_jobs()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_managed_datasets()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_managed_presets()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_mcp_tools()[source]#

Return all registered MCP tools with their enabled/disabled status.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_models()[source]#

Return the list of available HuggingFace models.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_operators()[source]#

Return all available pipeline operators with their constructor parameters.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_playground_sessions()[source]#

List existing playground upload sessions.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_preset_matrices()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_runners()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_runs(
dataset: str | None = Query(None),
commit: str | None = Query(None),
limit: int = Query(200),
offset: int = Query(0),
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_schedules()[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.list_upcoming(count: int = Query(10))[source]#

Return the next count scheduled fire times across all enabled cron schedules.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.pause_runner_endpoint(runner_id: int)[source]#

Temporarily pause a runner so no new jobs are dispatched to it.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.playground_ingest(
req: PlaygroundIngestRequest,
)[source]#

Trigger a harness run using uploaded playground documents.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.playground_upload(
files: list[UploadFile] = File(PydanticUndefined),
)[source]#

Upload documents to a temporary directory for playground ingestion.

Returns the session_id and list of uploaded file names.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.reject_job_endpoint(
job_id: str,
req: JobRejectRequest,
)[source]#

A runner reports it cannot execute this job (e.g. missing dataset).

The runner is added to the job’s rejected list so it won’t be offered again, and a system alert is created so the operator can resolve the issue.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.rerun_run(
run_id: int,
req: RerunRequest | None = None,
)[source]#

Create a new job that reproduces the exact configuration of a previous run.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.restore_database(
req: DatabaseRestoreRequest,
)[source]#

Restore the database from a backup.

A safety backup is automatically created before overwriting the current database file.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.restore_managed_dataset(dataset_id: int)[source]#

Re-activate a soft-deleted dataset.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.resume_runner_endpoint(runner_id: int)[source]#

Resume a paused runner so it can receive jobs again.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.run_graph_endpoint(
graph_id: int,
req: GraphRunRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.run_retrieval_query(
run_id: int,
req: RetrievalQueryRequest,
)[source]#

Execute a retrieval query against a run’s LanceDB database.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.runner_get_work(runner_id: int)[source]#

Return the next pending job for this runner (assigned or unassigned), or 204 if none.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.runner_heartbeat(
runner_id: int,
req: HeartbeatRequest | None = None,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.runner_update_complete(
runner_id: int,
req: RunnerUpdateCompleteRequest,
)[source]#

Called by a runner after it restarts from a portal-triggered code update.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.test_detect_model(
req: DetectTestRequest,
)[source]#

Run an object-detection model on a base64-encoded image.

Returns detected boxes drawn on the original image (as base64) plus a structured list of detections.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.test_embed_model(
req: EmbedTestRequest,
)[source]#

Send texts to an embedding model and return vectors + metadata.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.test_ocr_model(req: OCRTestRequest)[source]#

Run OCR on a base64-encoded image and return extracted text.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.test_parse_model(
req: ParseTestRequest,
)[source]#

Run Nemotron Parse on a base64-encoded image and return structured Markdown.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.test_rerank_model(
req: RerankTestRequest,
)[source]#

Score query-document relevance pairs using a cross-encoder reranker.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.test_slack_notification()[source]#

Send a test message to the configured Slack webhook URL.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.toggle_mcp_tool(
tool_key: str,
req: MCPToolToggleRequest,
)[source]#

Enable or disable a specific MCP tool.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.trigger_preset_matrix(
matrix_id: int,
req: MatrixTriggerRequest | None = None,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.trigger_run(req: TriggerRequest)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.trigger_schedule(schedule_id: int)[source]#

Manually fire a schedule now, bypassing the cron timer.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_alert_rule_endpoint(
rule_id: int,
req: AlertRuleUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_graph_endpoint(
graph_id: int,
req: GraphUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_managed_dataset(
dataset_id: int,
req: DatasetUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_managed_preset(
preset_id: int,
req: PresetUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_mcp_config(
req: MCPConfigUpdateRequest,
)[source]#

Update MCP server configuration.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_portal_settings(
req: PortalSettingsUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_preset_matrix(
matrix_id: int,
req: PresetMatrixUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_runner_endpoint(
runner_id: int,
req: RunnerUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_runners_only(
req: UpdateRunnersRequest,
)[source]#

Signal all online/paused runners to update to the latest commit on a branch.

This does NOT restart the portal — it only resolves the branch to a SHA and sets pending_update_commit on every eligible runner.

async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.update_schedule_endpoint(
schedule_id: int,
req: ScheduleUpdateRequest,
)[source]#
async nemo_retriever.harness.portal.app.upload_run_artifacts(
run_id: int,
file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined),
)[source]#

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_registry module#

Decorator-driven registration of MCP-exposed portal tools.

Usage:

from nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_registry import portal_tool

@portal_tool(
    name="trigger_benchmark_run",
    category="Jobs",
    description="Trigger a benchmark run with a dataset and optional preset",
)
async def trigger_run(dataset: str, preset: str | None = None) -> dict:
    ...

Decorated functions are collected into a module-level registry at import time. The MCP server reads this registry at startup to build its tool list. The same pkgutil.walk_packages scan that activates @designer_component also activates @portal_tool, so no separate discovery pass is needed.

class nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_registry.ToolMeta(
name: str,
category: str,
description: str,
tags: list[str] = <factory>,
)[source]#

Bases: object

Metadata attached to every @portal_tool-decorated function.

category: str#
description: str#
name: str#
tags: list[str]#
nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_registry.get_tool_registry() → dict[str, dict[str, Any]][source]#

Return a shallow copy of the tool registry.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_registry.portal_tool(
*,
name: str,
category: str = 'General',
description: str = '',
tags: list[str] | None = None,
)[source]#

Register a function as an MCP-exposed portal tool.

Parameters:

  • name (str) – Friendly tool name exposed to MCP clients.

  • category (str) – Grouping label shown in the Settings UI (e.g. "Jobs").

  • description (str) – Human-readable description sent to MCP clients so agents understand what this tool does.

  • tags (list[str] | None) – Optional free-form tags for filtering in the UI.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_server module#

MCP server integration for the Harness Portal.

Builds a FastMCP server whose tools are populated from the @portal_tool registry. Each invocation is wrapped with an audit logger that writes to the mcp_audit_log SQLite table.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_server.build_mcp_app()[source]#

Create the ASGI app from the MCP server, suitable for mounting.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_server.register_resources() → None[source]#

Register MCP resources for read-only portal state.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_server.register_tools_from_registry() → int[source]#

Scan the @portal_tool registry and register enabled tools with the MCP server. Returns the number of tools registered.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools module#

MCP tool definitions for the Harness Portal.

Each function decorated with @portal_tool is automatically discovered at import time and registered with the MCP server on portal startup. Developers can add new tools simply by adding a decorated function here (or in any other module under nemo_retriever).

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.compare_runs(run_id_a: int, run_id_b: int) → dict[str, Any][source]#

Compare metrics between two runs.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.create_schedule(
name: str,
dataset: str,
cron_expression: str,
preset: str | None = None,
description: str | None = None,
) → dict[str, Any][source]#

Create a cron schedule for recurring benchmark runs.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.get_portal_status() → dict[str, Any][source]#

Get portal health and version information.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.get_run_details(run_id: int) → dict[str, Any][source]#

Get detailed results for a specific run.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.list_alert_events(limit: int = 50) → list[dict[str, Any]][source]#

List recent alert events.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.list_datasets() → list[dict[str, Any]][source]#

List managed benchmark datasets.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.list_presets() → list[dict[str, Any]][source]#

List managed presets.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.list_runners() → list[dict[str, Any]][source]#

List registered runners.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.list_runs(
dataset: str | None = None,
limit: int = 50,
) → list[dict[str, Any]][source]#

List recent benchmark runs.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.list_schedules() → list[dict[str, Any]][source]#

List all schedules.

nemo_retriever.harness.portal.mcp_tools.trigger_benchmark_run(
dataset: str,
preset: str | None = None,
runner_id: int | None = None,
tags: list[str] | None = None,
) → dict[str, Any][source]#

Trigger a benchmark run.
